description: 5-digit Maryland zip code identifying the geographic area. Filtered to only zip codes present in the foreclosure dataset to exclude out-of-state records.
Calendar quarter of the observation (1-4). Derived from the year_month field in the source data.
Total number of electric and plug-in hybrid vehicle registrations in this zip code during this quarter. Combines both Electric and Plug-in Hybrid fuel categories from the source data.
